1.name: Rage
1.description: Bonus action: enter rage for 1 minute. Advantage on STR checks/saves, bonus melee damage (scales 2→4 by level), resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing. 2 uses/day, scaling to unlimited at 20.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.description: While not wearing armor, AC = 10 + DEX mod + CON mod. Can use a shield.

2.name: Reckless Attack
2.description: Advantage on all STR-based melee attacks this turn; attacks against you also have advantage until your next turn.

2.name: Danger Sense
2.description: Advantage on DEX saving throws against effects you can see (traps, spells), unless blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

3.name: Primal Path
3.description: Choose a subclass: Berserker, Totem Warrior, Ancestral Guardian, Storm Herald, Zealot, Beast, Wild Magic, or others.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

5.name: Fast Movement
5.description: Speed increases by 10 ft while not wearing heavy armor.

7.name: Feral Instinct
7.description: Advantage on Initiative rolls. If surprised at start of combat, you can act normally if you enter rage before your first action.

9.name: Brutal Critical
9.description: Roll one additional weapon damage die on critical hits. Increases to two extra dice at level 13, three at level 17.

11.name: Relentless Rage
11.description: If you drop to 0 HP while raging and don't die, make a DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each use, resets on short or long rest.

15.name: Persistent Rage
15.description: Rage only ends early if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

20.name: Primal Champion
20.description: STR and CON each increase by 4. Your maximum for those scores is now 24.
